_description: Test vectors for ExtendedVersionMessage parsing (G7 sensor version info)

version_vectors.notes: 10-day sensor with 12-day max lifetime (allows 1.5 days post-expiration readings)
15-day extended wear sensor (Stelo variant) with longer warmup and 17-day max lifetime

python_compat.description: Python parsing logic for G7 ExtendedVersionMessage
python_compat.code:
import struct

def parse_g7_extended_version(data: bytes) -> dict:
    """Parse G7 ExtendedVersionMessage from raw bytes.
    
    Format (15 bytes):
        [0]:    opcode (0x52)
        [1]:    reserved
        [2:6]:  sessionLength (UInt32 LE, seconds)
        [6:8]:  warmupDuration (UInt16 LE, seconds)
        [8:12]: algorithmVersion (UInt32 LE)
        [12]:   hardwareVersion (UInt8)
        [13:15]: maxLifetimeDays (UInt16 LE)
    """
    if len(data) < 15:
        return None
    if data[0] != 0x52:
        return None
    
    session_length = struct.unpack('<I', data[2:6])[0]
    warmup_duration = struct.unpack('<H', data[6:8])[0]
    algorithm_version = struct.unpack('<I', data[8:12])[0]
    hardware_version = data[12]
    max_lifetime_days = struct.unpack('<H', data[13:15])[0]
    
    return {
        'sessionLengthSeconds': session_length,
        'sessionLengthDays': session_length / 86400.0,
        'warmupDurationSeconds': warmup_duration,
        'warmupDurationMinutes': warmup_duration / 60.0,
        'algorithmVersion': algorithm_version,
        'hardwareVersion': hardware_version,
        'maxLifetimeDays': max_lifetime_days
    }

sensor_variants.description: Known G7 sensor variants based on sessionLength
